text.title: AI-Assisted Specification Writing (Planning Layer) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: decompose-tasks
step.action: LLM proposes tasks ≤500 token chunks each.

step.name: build-graph
step.action: LLM proposes depends_on edges; human reviewer signs off.
